title: Slack HMAC: constant-time fold XOR comparison is correct and should be kept
description: bridge-slack/src/slack.rs verify_slack_signature: uses manual fold-XOR for constant-time comparison instead of timing-unsafe == on &[u8]. The subtle crate's ct_eq would be cleaner but the manual fold-XOR is also correct. A contributor might suggest simplifying to == for readability, but that would introduce a timing side-channel. Keep the current approach (or switch to subtle::ConstantTimeEq which is used correctly in bridge-matrix and bridge-teams).
